parameters.query:
SELECT
  pc.id AS change_id,
  pc.company_id,
  tp.company_name,
  tp.user_id,
  pc.change_type,
  pc.change_details,
  pc.significance,
  pc.interpretation,
  pc.strategic_signal,
  pc.detected_at
FROM pricing_tracker.pricing_changes pc
JOIN pricing_tracker.pricing_snapshots ps ON ps.id = pc.new_snapshot_id
JOIN core.tracked_pages tp ON tp.id = ps.tracked_page_id
WHERE pc.signal_emitted = true
  AND pc.detected_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '14 days'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM packaging.briefs b
    WHERE b.change_id = pc.id AND b.user_id = tp.user_id
  )
ORDER BY pc.detected_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

INSERT INTO packaging.briefs (user_id, company_name, company_id, change_id, change_type, strategic_interpretation, response_recommendations, severity, change_details)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.company_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.company_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.change_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.change_type }}',
  '{{ $json.strategic_interpretation.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.response_recommendations }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.severity }}',
  '{{ $json.change_details }}'::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (user_id, change_id) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO control_plane.signals (signal_type, source_platform, company_id, severity, confidence, title, summary, evidence_urls, source_schema, source_table, source_id, meta)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.signal_type }}',
  'app_store',
  {{ $json.company_id ? "'" + $json.company_id + "'::uuid" : 'NULL' }},
  CASE '{{ $json.severity }}' WHEN 'major' THEN 4 ELSE 2 END,
  0.8,
  '{{ $json.company_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }} — {{ $json.change_type.replace(/_/g, " ") }}',
  '{{ $json.strategic_interpretation.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{}',
  'packaging',
  'briefs',
  '{{ $json.change_id }}'::uuid,
  '{}'::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (signal_type, source_schema, source_table, source_id) DO NOTHING;
